name: memor-re
description: Installable memor.re Council and product-operating workflows for Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Council, delivery, handoff, and product-operating workflows for Claude Code.
interface.longDescription: memor.re is a universal memory operating system. This plugin exposes the Council agent bench, delivery workflow skills (closer, letsgo, handoff, clean, ghosthunter, learn, integrator, task-manager, negotiator), and design/UI/values agents for Claude Code. MCP is wired via the project-root .mcp.json; no platform checkout or MEMOR_RE_PLATFORM_ROOT is required for hosted capability. Operator/developer checkout enables full workspace CLI delegation through mcp-server.mjs.
defaultPrompt: Use memor.re Council to route this product decision.
Use /letsgo to validate and ship this focused slice.
Use /closer to sequence and close this work.
Use /ghosthunter to classify stale authority and residue.

x-memor-re.mcpNote: MCP is wired at the project root via .mcp.json, not inside this plugin directory. The plugin-root .mcp.json is Codex-format (hosted URL). Do not confuse the two.
